inline_comments.message: This change should be made in the hibernate definitions (hbm.xml files) in so/mso-catalog-db/src/main/resources.  Basically, you should change the hbm.xml file(s), then do an "so" build, which should regenerate MySQL-Catalog-schema.sql (under "so").  Then, copy the generated schema to docker-config/volumes/mariadb/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/db-sql-scripts/main-schemas.
